external_references.source_name: Palo Alto VOID MANTICORE Iran Cyber Threats March 2026
external_references.description: Justin Moore. (2026, March 16). Iranian Cyber Threat Evolution: From MBR Wipers to Identity Weaponization. Retrieved April 20, 2026.

objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has abused built-in remote wipe or factory reset commands to wipe devices managed within an organization’s Cloud management solution impacting laptops, servers, and mobile devices.(Citation: Palo Alto VOID MANTICORE Iran Cyber Threats March 2026)
